mapper.select: SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, NODE_NM, MODEL_NUM, MODEL_ID , IP_ADDR, MAC_ADDR, ADMIN_YN, PRIMARY_GB, SNMP_VER , SNMP_COMMUNITY, SNMP_PORT, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, NETCONF_PORT , NETCONF_ID, NETCONF_PW, NETCONF_TYPE, NODE_DIVISION, VENDOR , SFLOW_IP, UP_DATETIME, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM RESOURCE.TB_CODE WHERE CATEGORY_CD = 'node_model' AND CODE_ID = MODEL_ID) AS MODEL_NM FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST WHERE IP_ADDR = #{ipAddr}
